vocab.example: 他把所有的零用钱都捐出了。
这只小猫的长相有点奇怪。
未成年人不能购买酒类。
下课了，同学们纷纷跑出教室。
在这里，我感到一切都很陌生。
你必须在明天之前完成任务。
这些巧克力饼干很好吃。
我们度过了一个愉快的假期。
我邀请他来参加我的生日派对。
做一个自私的人是不会有朋友的。
这个计划缺少一些关键细节。

sentences.text: “我们怎么办？”小华愁眉苦脸地对班长说。
他们终于明白了分享能带给大家快乐。
小华把事情的来龙去脉一五一十地向老师报告。
sentences.description: Reporting the whole story from start to finish.

sentences.text: 我和小明向校长认错，并答应以后不再重蹈覆辙了。
sentences.description: Admitting mistakes and promising not to repeat them.

sentences.text: 我们接受完一场暴风骤雨般的责骂后，休息时间也结束了。

捐出.zh: 同学们纷纷捐出自己的零花钱帮助灾区。
捐出.en: Students donated their pocket money one after another to help disaster areas.

捐出.zh: 他决定把不穿的旧衣服捐给有需要的人。
捐出.en: He decided to donate unworn old clothes to people in need.

捐出.zh: 图书馆收到了社会捐出的数千本书籍。
捐出.en: The library received thousands of books donated by society.

捐出.zh: 学校组织了捐出图书的公益活动。
捐出.en: The school organized a public welfare event to donate books.

新鲜.zh: 菜市场里有刚采摘的新鲜蔬菜。
新鲜.en: There are freshly picked fresh vegetables in the food market.

新鲜.zh: 早晨去公园散步可以呼吸新鲜空气。
新鲜.en: Taking a morning walk in the park allows one to breathe fresh air.

新鲜.zh: 这件事对他来说非常新鲜，很有趣。
新鲜.en: This matter was very novel and interesting to him.

新鲜.zh: 海鲜一定要保持新鲜才能食用。
新鲜.en: Seafood must be kept fresh to be consumed.

新鲜.zh: 刚出炉的面包泛着新鲜的香味。
新鲜.en: Freshly baked bread exudes a fresh aroma.

奇怪.zh: 天空中出现了奇怪的景象。
奇怪.en: A strange phenomenon appeared in the sky.

奇怪.zh: 感到奇怪的是，今天他竟然没有迟到。
奇怪.en: What felt strange was that he actually wasn't late today.

奇怪.zh: 这个箱子发出了奇怪的声音。
奇怪.en: This box made a strange sound.

奇怪.zh: 不要理会那些奇怪的谣言。
奇怪.en: Pay no attention to those strange rumors.

奇怪.zh: 这种植物的长相十分奇怪。
奇怪.en: The appearance of this plant is extremely strange.

敲.en: Please knock softly on the door before entering.

敲.zh: 弟弟喜欢拿着小棒敲打桌子。
敲.en: Little brother likes holding a small stick and tapping the table.

敲.zh: 远处传来了敲钟的声音。
敲.en: The sound of tolling bells came from afar.

敲.zh: 工程师正用锤子敲敲打打。
敲.en: The engineer is hammering and pounding with a hammer.

敲.zh: 他敲了敲键盘，输出了文字。
敲.en: He tapped the keyboard and produced text.

酒类.zh: 未成年人严禁购买和饮用酒类饮料。
酒类.en: Minors are strictly prohibited from purchasing and drinking alcoholic beverages.

酒类.zh: 超市的酒类专柜摆满了各式名酒。
酒类.en: The liquor counter in the supermarket is lined with various famous wines.

酒类.zh: 驾驶人员切勿在饮用酒类后开车。
酒类.en: Drivers must never drive after consuming alcohol.

酒类.zh: 商店里停止向年轻人出售酒类产品。
酒类.en: Shops stopped selling alcoholic products to youth.

酒类.zh: 这种酒类含有较高的酒精成分。
酒类.en: This type of alcohol contains high alcohol content.

果汁.zh: 夏天喝一杯冰镇果汁非常解渴。
果汁.en: Drinking a glass of chilled fruit juice in summer is very thirst-quenching.

果汁.zh: 妈妈用新鲜苹果榨了一杯果汁。
果汁.en: Mom squeezed a glass of juice using fresh apples.

果汁.zh: 相比汽水，纯果汁更加健康。
果汁.en: Compared to soda, pure juice is healthier.

果汁.zh: 早餐时我喜欢配一杯橙色果汁。
果汁.en: I like pairing breakfast with a glass of orange juice.

果汁.zh: 瓶装果汁里不宜含有过多添加剂。
果汁.en: Bottled juices shouldn't contain excessive additives.

纷纷.zh: 树叶在秋风中纷纷落了下来。
纷纷.en: Leaves fell one after another in the autumn wind.

纷纷.zh: 听到这个好消息，大家纷纷表示赞同。
纷纷.en: Hearing this good news, everyone expressed approval one after another.

纷纷.zh: 课间休息时，同学们纷纷走出教室活动。
纷纷.en: During recess, students stepped out of the classroom one after another for activities.

纷纷.zh: 大雪纷纷扬扬地从天空飘落。
纷纷.en: Heavy snow drifted down sequentially from the sky.

纷纷.zh: 观众们纷纷起立向演员致敬。
纷纷.en: Audience members stood up one after another to pay tribute to actors.

陌生.zh: 来到一个陌生的环境，他感到有些拘束。
陌生.en: Arriving in an unfamiliar environment, he felt somewhat constrained.

陌生.zh: 家长教育我们不要轻信陌生人。
陌生.en: Parents teach us not to easily trust strangers.

陌生.zh: 这条马路对我来说十分陌生。
陌生.en: This road is very unfamiliar to me.

陌生.zh: 经过几天的交流，原本陌生的人变熟悉了。
陌生.en: After several days of communication, originally unfamiliar people grew familiar.

陌生.zh: 接到陌生电话时要提高警惕。
陌生.en: Raise your vigilance when receiving calls from unfamiliar numbers.

必须.zh: 我们必须在规定时间内完成任务。
必须.en: We must complete the task within the specified time.

必须.zh: 乘车时必须系好安全带。
必须.en: You must fasten your seatbelt when riding in a vehicle.

必须.zh: 想要取得好成绩，必须付诸努力。
必须.en: If you want good grades, you must exert effort.

必须.zh: 每个人都必须遵守社会规则。
出国前必须办理好相关手续。
必须.en: You must complete relevant procedures before going abroad.

饼干.zh: 妹妹最喜欢吃巧克力口味的饼干。
饼干.en: Younger sister likes chocolate-flavored biscuits best.

饼干.zh: 盒子里装满了手工制作的饼干。
饼干.en: The box was filled with handmade cookies.

饼干.zh: 下午茶时间，我们配着红茶吃饼干。
饼干.en: At afternoon tea time, we ate cookies paired with black tea.

饼干.zh: 这种饼干吃起来香脆可口。
饼干.en: This cookie tastes crispy and delicious.

饼干.zh: 妈妈教我如何烘焙小饼干。
饼干.en: Mom taught me how to bake small cookies.

愉快.zh: 祝你度过一个愉快的周末！
我们在公园里度过了愉快的一天。
愉快.en: We spent a pleasant day in the park.

愉快.zh: 愉快的交谈拉近了大家的距离。
保持愉快的心情有助于身体健康。
愉快.en: Maintaining a joyful mood contributes to physical health.

愉快.zh: 听到这首音乐，人的心情会变得很愉快。
愉快.en: Hearing this music, one's mood becomes very cheerful.

邀请.zh: 我邀请了朋友们来我家参加派对。
邀请.en: I invited friends over to my home for a party.

邀请.zh: 谢谢你的热情邀请，我一定按时参加。
邀请.en: Thank you for your warm invitation; I will definitely attend on time.

邀请.zh: 学校邀请了专家来做专题讲座。
邀请.en: The school invited experts to give a special lecture.

邀请.zh: 他收到了来自知名企业的入职邀请。
邀请.en: He received a job offer invitation from a well-known enterprise.

邀请.zh: 主持人邀请获奖者上台领奖。
邀请.en: The host invited the winners on stage to accept awards.

存放.zh: 请把贵重物品存放妥当。
药品应该存放在阴凉干燥的地方。
存放.en: Medicines should be stored in a cool and dry place.

存放.zh: 图书馆提供了存放包袋的储物柜。
存放.en: The library provides lockers for storing bags.

存放.zh: 这些遗留的物品临时存放在仓库里。
存放.en: These leftover items are temporarily stored in the warehouse.

存放.zh: 食物存放时间太长容易变质。
存放.en: Food stored for too long easily spoils.

烧水.zh: 妈妈正在厨房里用水壶烧水。
烧水.en: Mom is boiling water with a kettle in the kitchen.

烧水.zh: 饮用自来水前一定要先烧水煮沸。
烧水.en: Tap water must be boiled before drinking.

烧水.zh: 烧水时切记不要离开厨房。
烧水.en: Remember not to leave the kitchen while boiling water.

烧水.zh: 水壶发出响声，代表水烧好了。
烧水.en: The kettle hummed, indicating the water was boiled.

烧水.zh: 用烧好的水冲泡一杯热茶。
烧水.en: Make a cup of hot tea with boiled water.

宁静.zh: 夜晚的小乡村显得格外宁静。
宁静.en: The small village appears exceptionally tranquil at night.

宁静.zh: 我喜欢在宁静的环境里阅读书本。
宁静.en: I like reading books in a quiet environment.

宁静.zh: 清晨的湖边一片宁静，空气清新。
宁静.en: The lakeside in early morning is quiet, with fresh air.

宁静.zh: 喧嚣过后，小镇恢复了原有的宁静。
宁静.en: After the hustle, the town restored its original tranquility.

宁静.zh: 宁静的心态能让人看清许多事物。
宁静.en: A serene mindset can help one see many things clearly.

一溜烟.zh: 看到警察走来，小偷一溜烟跑掉了。
一溜烟.en: Seeing the police approaching, the thief ran away in a flash.

一溜烟.zh: 下课铃一响，同学们一溜烟冲出了教室。
一溜烟.en: As soon as the bell rang, students rushed out of the classroom like a shot.

一溜烟.zh: 小狗一溜烟钻进了草丛里不见了。
一溜烟.en: The puppy darted into the bushes in a flash and disappeared.

一溜烟.zh: 听到妈妈的呼唤，他一溜烟跑回家。
一溜烟.en: Hearing Mom calling, he ran home in a flash.

一溜烟.zh: 赛跑选手像一溜烟似地冲向终点。
一溜烟.en: Sprinters rushed toward the finish line like a flash.

自私.zh: 只顾自己不顾别人的行为是自私的。
自私.en: Thinking only of oneself without considering others is selfish behavior.

自私.zh: 我们不能做一个自私自利的人。
自私.en: We should not become a selfish person.

自私.zh: 克服自私心理，学会关心他人。
自私.en: Overcome selfish mentalities and learn to care for others.

自私.zh: 他的自私举动伤害了朋友的信任。
自私.en: His selfish move damaged his friend's trust.

自私.zh: 在团队里，自私的行为是不受欢迎的。
自私.en: Within a team, selfish actions are unwelcome.

缺少.zh: 植物缺少了阳光和水就无法成长。
缺少.en: Plants cannot grow if they lack sunlight and water.

缺少.zh: 这篇文章缺少具体的细节描写。
缺少.en: This article lacks concrete detailed descriptions.

缺少.zh: 我们团队现在缺少一名懂技术的人员。
缺少.en: Our team currently lacks a technician who understands technology.

缺少.zh: 长期缺少运动会导致体质下降。
缺少.en: Long-term lack of exercise leads to declining physical fitness.

缺少.zh: 遇到困难时，我们最不能缺少信心。
缺少.en: When encountering difficulties, confidence is what we can least lack.
